title: Pan-Fried Ukrainian Pierogi with Gouda Cheese
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish filled with a blend of melted gouda cheese, served pan-fried to perfection. The crispy exterior and fluffy interior make this a delightful snack.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the crumbled bacon and cook until crispy, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of butter to the skillet and melt.
Add the pierogi to the skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Add the shredded gouda cheese to the skillet and stir until melted and well combined with the pierogi.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pierogi hot, topped with crispy bacon and additional cheese if desired.
